title: Gooey Korean Dumplings in Olive Oil
description: A twist on traditional dumplings by pan-frying them in a mixture of olive oil and gooey sauce.
instructions: 1. In a small bowl, mix together olive oil, gooey sauce, Korean chili flakes, and soy sauce.
2. Pan-fry the wonton wrappers in the mixture until golden brown.
3. Remove the wrappers from the pan and place them on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
4. In a separate pan, heat a small amount of olive oil over medium heat.
5. Add the chopped green onions and grated ginger to the pan and stir-fry for 1 minute.
6. Add the pan-fried dumplings back into the pan with the green onion mixture and stir-fry for another minute.
7. Serve the dumplings hot and enjoy!
